localized_texts.text: Adventure Cove Waterpark™

Get immersed in a true world of water at Adventure Cove Waterpark. Let your hair down and relax on a float, or ride the massive waves of the Adventure River. Get your dose of adrenaline and soar on Adventure Cove Waterpark's hydro-magnetic coaster, the RipTide! Enjoy marine life up close as you slip through the transparent tunnel of Underwater World. Then, swim among the 20,000 fishes at Rainbow Reef.
Get immersed in a true world of water at Adventure Cove Waterpark
Get your dose of adrenaline and soar on Adventure Cove Waterpark's hydro-magnetic coaster
Swim among the 20,000 fishes at Rainbow Reef.
Ray Bay Encounter: Wade in with dozens of rays for an unforgettable, interactive feeding encounter.
Riptide Rocket: Be prepared for a series of gravity-defying climbs and plummeting, twist and turns and adrenaline-pumping drops.
13 Rides & Attractions
Adventure River: Lay back and drift down Adventure River, taking in 14 stunning themed zones, including a jungle garden and grotto cave.
Big Bucket Treehouse: Brace yourself for the tipping of the brimming buckets, just some of the many water plays loved by kids of all ages!
Bluwater Bay: Frolic in this giant pool and feel your excitement build with the waves!
Dueling Racer: Put your slide skills to the test against your partner on this thrilling two-lane waterslide in a race to the bottom.
Pipeline Plunge: Get soaked in a dark tunnel, be surprised by radical twists and exhilarating dips before plunging into a pool of water.
Rainbow Reef: Come snorkel around the most incredible rainbow reef and be stunned by the kaleidoscopic colours of 20,000 reef inhabitants.
Ray Bay Encounter: Wade in with dozens of rays for an unforgettable, interactive feeding encounter.
Riptide Rocket: Be prepared for a series of gravity-defying climbs and plummeting, twist and turns and adrenaline-pumping drops.
Seahorse Hideaway: Let your little ones have a splashing good time dodging the squirting seahorses in a wading pool as you watch on.
Spiral Washout: Get funnelled down an exhilarating tube ride and sent reeling at incredible speeds. It’s a washout of epic proportions!
Splashworks: Stack on challenge after challenge. The insane fun includes challenging water activities over a welcoming deep pool. [Temporarily Unavailable]
Tidal Twister: What begins as a gentle flume ride soon descends into multiple swirls, sending you careening at maximum speed and fun!
Whirlpool Washout: Get carried at high speed through spinning revolutions and whirlpool before ‘washing out’ into an open splash pool.
Weather: For safety of guests and team members in the event of severe weather with lightning, all outdoor attractions in ACW may close temporarily.
Restrictions: Most water attractions are physically demanding, and is not recommended for expectant mothers.
Dresscode: Appropriate swimwear recommended.
Dresscode: For the safety of our guests, swim masks are not permitted inside Adventure Cove Waterpark.
Dresscode: However, basic swim goggles and baby aided floating devices are permitted.
Dresscode: Flotation device for adults and life jackets for adults and children are available free of charge in the waterpark.
Accessibility: A complimentary Rider's Guide for guests with disabilities is available at Guest Services windows located inside the Waterpark.
Entry pass generation will take 6-12 hours
What’s included: ACW $10 Meal or Retail voucher
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter

Terms & Conditions: The ticket is valid for entry for 7 days starting from the selected visit date. Non-transferable, not for sale or exchange and non-refundable, including, but not limited to events outside Resorts World Sentosa’s control; governmental acts, acts of God, riots, strikes, natural disasters, haze or inclement weather (regardless of severity). Void if Altered, Tampered or Damaged. Applicable for admission during regular park operating hours, not valid during Special Events. Regular Park operating hours is subject to change without prior notice. Hand stamp and ticket required for same day re-entry into Universal Studios Singapore, S.E.A. Aquarium or Adventure Cove Waterpark only. Please be careful of your safety and belongings at all times, as we shall not be liable for any damage or loss that you may suffer arising from your use of Universal Studios Singapore, S.E.A. Aquarium or Adventure Cove Waterpark, whether such damage or loss is caused by our negligence or otherwise. These premises are under surveillance. For the safety of all of our guests, team members and marine animals, Resorts World Sentosa will be conducting bag checks on all personal and/or hand carry baggage. Failure to follow posted guidelines may result in serious injury or expulsion from the attraction. Revalidation must be submitted within 7 days after the original ticket visit date. Revalidation requests must be submitted at least 3 business days before the new requested visit date. All revalidation requests are subject to merchant approval and may incur additional charges.

How to use: A second email will be sent to you once the booking is confirmed and are subjected to availability.

Terms & Conditions: Programme is exclusively reserved for guests with friends or family participating in the Dolphin Exploration, Dolphin Immersion, or Dolphin Connection programmes. Children of all ages may participate as observers. Additional Requirements where participants are aged below 13 years of age: - Children below 13 years of age must be always accompanied by a paying adult participant (21 years old and above); - Maximum supervisory ratio of 3 children to 1 adult (21 years of age or older). Participants entering from Adventure Cove Waterpark™ are advised to enter the park 45 minutes prior to the start of the programme. Check-in will open 30 minutes prior to the programme start time at the Marine Mammal Habitat Entrance in Adventure Cove Waterpark™ and will close 10 minutes after the programme start time. Participants who arrive after the cut-off time may be denied entry. No animal interaction is included in this programme. Photography and videography are not allowed. Guests are not allowed to bring in their belongings such as mobile phones and wallets, or wear jewellery and other accessories. Small lockers will be provided. All programmes are weather permitting, and subject to change by Resorts World Sentosa in its sole and absolute discretion. No outside food and beverages are allowed within Adventure Cove Waterpark™ and the Marine Mammal Habitat. Other general terms and conditions, park rules, and regulations of Adventure Cove Waterpark™ and the Marine Mammal Habitat apply. Guests who do not meet the terms and conditions of the programme may be denied entry. When more than 1 (one) QR code ticket is purchased, each guest should scan their respective unique QR code at the entrance. Not to be used for marketing or promotional purposes. Admin fees will apply for rescheduling. All rescheduling is subject to availability. Please see details and other important terms and conditions at https://www.singaporeoceanarium.com/en/ticketing-terms-and-conditions.html.
What’s included: Adventure Cove Waterpark
What’s included: Dolphin Exploration - English

ArtScience Museum at Marina Bay Sands

Step into the reimagined teamLab Future World at ArtScience Museum, created with internationally acclaimed art collective, teamLab. Since 2016, this permanent exhibition has welcomed millions of visitors. Now, it returns with its most ambitious transformation yet.The new evolution introduces the world’s first Light Sculpture with Paper Airplane. Here, visitors can launch a paper plane and watch it transform into a dazzling display of light and sound. The enhanced Crystal Universe also returns, immersing guests in a breathtaking galaxy of infinite crystals that respond to interactive inputs.Other refreshed installations include Continuous Life and Death, a luminous garden that blooms and withers in real time. In Flow Reaches Far, collective movements create vast swirling patterns. Waterfall Droplets brings playful illusions of bouncing water, while Sketch Umwelt World allows drawings to come alive on a giant screen. Each artwork transforms with every gesture, turning every visit into a unique and immersive journey.
Immerse yourself in a world of art, science, magic and metaphor through a collection of digital interactive installations.
This permanent exhibition is created in collaboration with teamLab, a renowned international art collective.
Future World takes visitors on an exciting journey of discovery through two sections – City in A Garden and Exploring New Frontiers.

Immerse yourself in a world of art, science, magic and metaphor through a collection of digital interactive installations. Future World takes visitors on an exciting journey of discovery through two sections - City in Nature and Exploring New Frontiers. This permanent exhibition is created in collaboration with teamLab, a renowned international art collective.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Marina Bay Sands ArtScience Museum official website for any updates of operation hours.
Restrictions: Guests must be at least 1.20m in order to enjoy artwork Aerial Climbing Through A Flock of Colored Birds. [Future World: Where Art Meets Science]
Restrictions: Guests are required to wear covered shoes at all times and not permitted to wear flip flops or high heels. [Future World: Where Art Meets Science]
Dresscode: Casual wear recommended.
Accessibility: A designated parking area for strollers is available near the exhibition entrance.
Strollers are not permitted inside Future World: Where Art Meets Science due to space constraints and for safety reasons.
Designated stroller parking area will be made available near the exhibition entrance.

Terms & Conditions: Tickets will only be issued upon receipt of full payment. Adult tickets are valid for 13 to 59 years old Concession tickets are valid for Senior Citizens above 60 years old, students, children aged 2-12 years old, Person with Disabilities (PWD), and NSF There are strictly NO refunds or exchanges on tickets after payment has been made. Off peak / Peak period refers to visits from Mondays to Sundays, it does not represent the purchase date by Travel Agents. Off peak period refers to visits from Mondays to Thursdays excluding Singapore Public Holidays, it does not represent the purchase date by Travel Agents. Peak refers to visits on Fridays to Sundays, Singapore Public Holidays, it does not represent the purchase date by Travel Agents. For Singapore Public Holidays, refer here, https://www.mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/public-holidays Tickets are subject to change & availability at the time of booking. Minimum purchase of 20 tickets for Travel Agent Single Dated Tickets is required for advance payment. Should it fall below the minimum, you may make payment via Cash/Credit Card directly at the Museum Box Office. Tickets for all other exhibitions except regular Future World are valid during their respective exhibition periods. Tickets for regular Future World are valid for 6 months based on the month (E.g.: Tickets purchased in any date in the month of Jan 2025, will have a validity as 1 Jan – 30 Jun 2025), the date will be based on the 1st to last day of the month. Please note that tickets for the partial reopening of Future World are valid until end July 2025, or upon full reopening of Future World, whichever earlier. Please ensure that full information is provided. Other Terms & Conditions of sale apply. Please note that the amount charged will be in Singapore Dollars. For Singapore Public Holidays, refer here, https://www.mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/public-holidays
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy

Big Bus Singapore

Hop on our Big Bus Tour to discover the sights, landmarks and attractions that define Singapore. There are 2 different Singapore tour routes to choose from, the City Tour (Yellow Line) and the Heritage Tour (Red Line).Experience the sights and sounds of Singapore at your leisure. With over 40 stops to hop on and off from, we have got all the best bits of Singapore covered. Tune in to pre-recorded audio commentary, available in 7 languages.The Yellow line will take you to the prominent sights of Singapore Flyer, Marina Bay Sands, Gardens by the Bay, Merlion, Singapore Botanic Gardens, and Raffles Hotel. The Red line tovarious ethnic neighborhoods -Little India, Kampong Glam, and Chinatown featuring pre-World War II restored shophouses, Buddhist and Hindu temples.
Uninterrupted Views: You can get uninterrupted views of iconic landmarks.
Audio Guide: The tour provides an engaging audio commentary in 7 languages.
Flexible Timing: Buses run every 15-25 minutes, providing you with the flexibility to explore Singapore at your own pace.

Your ticket gives you access to 2 hop-on hop-off sightseeing routes and it is not only the most comprehensive hop-on touring system in Singapore, but also a transport network that links you from hotels to key landmarks and attractions.Hop on to discover and Hop-off to explore the Lion City. For cultural discoveries, visit the 3 ethnic districts of Singapore – Chinatown, Little India and Kampong Glam – where you’ll find pre-World War II conserved shophouses, Buddhist and Hindu temples, and traditional trades and handicrafts. Don’t forget to check out the UNESCO world heritage site Botanic Gardens, glamourous and glitzy locations where hit movie Crazy Rich Asian was filmed, like Marina Bay Sands and Gardens by the Bay.Choose a 1 day Discover Ticket and hop off at any stop to explore Singapore your way. Pick a 2 day Essential Ticket for another day on the bus. Or go for a 2 day Explore Ticket that comes with a 3 hours guided Night City Tour.The Night City Tour is a 3 hours fully guided open-top, double-decker bus tour whereby you will be awed by the breathtaking view of the city skyline at Marina Barrage. Sampling of local food at Lau Pa Sat and catch the Garden Rhapsody light and sound show at the Supertree Grove, an impressive set of vertical gardens that light up in a dazzling display.

Restriction: During road closures, some bus stops may be skipped; in the event that this occurs, notices will be posted at counters and on buses

Breakfast in the Wild

Start your day well with this iconic dining experience designed to inspire a love for wildlife and delight your senses!Savour a hearty meal of local and international flavours in our charming rainforest zoo and meet our wildlife ambassadors and their keepers, who will fill your minds (and hearts) with stories about the animal kingdom, habitats and nature. Enjoy a scrumptious planet-friendly breakfast spread that is thoughtfully prepared by our chefs.
Enjoy photo opportunities and interact with our animal ambassadors such as the Coatimundi, Macaw and Orangutans in this iconic dining experience
Start your day well with this iconic dining experience designed to inspire a love for wildlife and delight your senses!
Savour a hearty meal of local and international flavours in our charming rainforest zoo and meet our wildlife ambassadors and their keepers

As part of making good choices to protect wildlife and our planet, our kitchen uses only sustainably-sourced palm oil and we serve Owa Coffee, which uses beans grown in a wildlife-friendly manner in Indonesia. The menu also doesn’t feature beef because of its disproportionately high environmental impact. Enjoy photo opportunities and interact with our animal ambassadors such as the Coatimundi, Macaw and Orangutans in this iconic dining experience.

Restriction: Please note that flash photography is not allowed for the wellbeing of our animals

Gardens by the Bay

Visit one of Singapore’s top attractions—Gardens by the Bay! Get your ticket today and enjoy a series of gardens full of flora and fauna set in mesmerizing interior and exterior structures. With the Flower Dome and Cloud Forest ticket, access the Flower Dome, the world's largest greenhouse, to witness its collection of exquisite florals and lush plants. Tour different gardens such as Mediterranean Garden, Succulent Garden, Australian Garden and more. Then, head to Cloud Forest, which boasts one of the world's largest indoor waterfalls at 35 metres tall. This landscape offers dramatic greenery, featuring vegetation that is typically native to habitats 2,000 metres above sea level. You can also admire the breathtaking Flight of the Moth Orchid display, a striking selection of orchids that form a cascading bloom.For a detailed overview of the 2026 seasonal highlights and floral showcases at Gardens by the Bay, view the official 2026 Highlights Flyer[Here]2026 Floral Displays in the Flower DomeJan – Mar 2026 | Spring Blossoms: Gallop into ProsperityMar – Apr 2026 | SakuraApr – May 2026 | TulipmaniaMay – Jun 2026 | Blue BeautiesJul – Aug 2026 | Orchid ExtravaganzaAug – Sep 2026 | LilytopiaOct – Nov 2026 | Sunflower SurpriseNov 2026 – Jan 2027 | Christmas Train Show
Visit one of Singapore’s top attractions—Gardens by the Bay!
Get your ticket today and enjoy a series of gardens full of flora and fauna set in mesmerizing interior and exterior structures.
Visit the world's largest greenhouse, to witness its collection of exquisite florals and lush plants
Featuring vegetation that is typically native to habitats 2,000 metres above sea level.

Cloud Forest: Home to one of the world’s tallest indoor waterfalls and a lush mountain clad with plants from around the world, Cloud Forest rewards the curious and adventurous. Go on a fascinating journey of discovery and get up close with some of the world’s most exotic plant species as you stroll along its unique aerial walkways.
Flower Dome: Get up-close with unusual plants native to a range of unique habitats – from the Mediterranean region, to South African savannahs and arid deserts!

Floral Fantasy: A stone’s throw from Bayfront MRT station, Floral Fantasy offers a magical escape among suspended bouquets and creative floral arrangements. Here, explore diverse garden landscapes that segue into each other through a meandering space. Along the way, stop by a vivarium populated by tiny poison dart frogs in a gamut of stunning hues!

OCBC Skyway: Enjoy the most enthralling views on the OCBC Skyway. Suspended between two Supertrees at 22 metres above ground, this 128m-long aerial walkway offers marvellous opportunities to capture that postcard-worthy shot of the Gardens’ lush surrounds, set in the heart of downtown Marina Bay.

Supertree Observatory: Get your cameras ready! Located at the tallest Supertree’s canopy, the Supertree Observatory offers unparalleled views of Gardens by the Bay’s lush surrounds and the Marina Bay area. Enjoy refreshments, an immersive digital learning experience, endless photo opportunities, and an unforgettable time at the Gardens’ highest point!

Singapore Cable Car

Begin the ultimate travel experience around Lion City with this unique Singapore Cable Car promotion. Take to the skies and enjoy unparalleled views of Singapore's top attractions from Mount Faber Park to Sentosa Island. Start or end your journey at Mount Faber, located near Bukit Merah and one of Singapore's oldest hilltop parks. Ride on a cable car in Singapore with your Sky Pass and access all six stations across the Sentosa Line and the Mount Faber Line. Get the Sky Pass with Meal deal and enjoy a daily set lunch at Arbora Hilltop Garden & Bistro, a unique restaurant offering the perfect dining experience and majestic views of Sentosa, or dinner at Good Old Days Restaurant, a family-friendly halal restaurant offering wok-made stir-fried vegetables and aromatic dishes.
Location: The only cableway that links Mount Faber, HarbourFront, and Sentosa Island.
Experience: Fly on board the Singapore Cable Car and enjoy the amazing aerial views that unfold all around you from 100 meters above sea level.
Duration: Each ride lasts around 30 minutes.
New Cable Cars: New spherical cable cars with transparent bottoms will be unveiled in Feb 2024 but will run in 2nd quarter of the year.
Mount Faber Line

The most scenic way to experience Singapore, the Mount Faber Line offers a variety of priceless 360º panoramic views. Start at the Mount Faber Station and enjoy the wonderful hilltop view of the lush rainforest before flying to the HarbourFront station to take in the stunning view of the Singapore Harbour. Be mesmerised by the breathtaking view of Sentosa as you fly into Sentosa station.
Sentosa Line

The Sentosa Line runs seamlessly throughout the island. Hop on the Singapore Cable Car at Imbiah Lookout Station and enjoy the spectacular bird’s eye view of the island before alighting at Siloso Point Station. Discover the rich history of Fort Siloso before hopping back on the cable car headed to Merlion station. Fly above the golden sandy beaches and snap an insta-worthy picture of the stunning landscape below.

Mount Faber to Sentosa: 1650 metres – around 13 minutes. (Time taken depends on weather conditions and speed of the cabin)

Singapore River Cruise

The Singapore River Cruise offers a relaxing way to explore the city’s rich history and iconic skyline from the water. Glide along the historic Singapore River aboard a traditional bumboat while enjoying panoramic views of both old and new Singapore.As the cruise passes through Clarke Quay, Boat Quay, and Marina Bay, you’ll see famous landmarks such as Merlion Park, Marina Bay Sands, and the Esplanade. Audio commentary provides insights into how the river transformed from a busy trading port into the vibrant heart of the city.Perfect for first-time visitors and returning travelers alike, the cruise is a calm yet engaging experience suitable for all ages. Whether during the day or at night, it’s an easy and memorable way to take in Singapore’s charm at a leisurely pace.
Experience a delightful bumboat cruise along the Singapore River.
Explore Singapore's past and present while sailing past key landmarks.
Enjoy views of the old shophouses at Boat Quay, Merlion Park, Marina Bay Sands and more.
Learn interesting facts about Singapore's history and landmarks through onboard commentary.

Expect a smooth and leisurely boat ride along the Singapore River on a traditional bumboat. The cruise typically lasts around 40 minutes, offering a comfortable pace to sit back, relax, and enjoy the scenery.During the journey, you’ll pass iconic areas such as Clarke Quay, Boat Quay, and Marina Bay, with clear views of well-known landmarks including Merlion Park, Marina Bay Sands, and the Esplanade. Recorded audio commentary shares brief stories about Singapore’s history, culture, and riverside development.The cruise is suitable for all ages and runs throughout the day, with evening cruises offering especially beautiful city views as the skyline lights up. Seating is sheltered, making it a pleasant experience in most weather conditions.

Singapore Zoo

Get closer to the wild than you’ve ever imagined with this Ultimate Wildlife Experience!. World renowned for our open concept, enjoy unparalleled views of our animals as they roam around their lush habitats. See them walk right up to you, and be among them when you step into our walk-through biodome. Enjoy our award-winning Jungle Breakfast with Wildlife as you dine with our adorable orang utans, and be entertained by our exciting and interactive animal shows! Our wildlife wonderland is home to over 2,800 animals and they can’t wait to meet you!
KidzWorld: Home of the Ranger Buddies - meet the world smallest horse breed, the Falabella at Animal Land.
Fragile Forest: Step into this 20,000 cubic meter biodome that mimics a tropical rainforest habitat.
RepTopia: Encounter captivating reptiles such as the Bearded Dragon, Dyeing Poison Frog and the Panther Chameleon.
Activities:
- Feed the Animals: Catch our animals when they’re most active — during feeding sessions!
- Wildlife Experiences: Make your visit extra wild! Go behind-the-scenes and get closer to our wildlife!
- Keeper Talk: Learn more about our wildlife from the people who know best — the keepers! Hear interesting quirks of the animals and get a chance to feed some of them yourselves.
- Presentations: Catch our presentations to witness the amazing talents of our animals alongside their trainers.
- For Kids: A multitude of fun activities awaits kids! From a water playground for a splashing good time, close encounters with farmyard animals, to a wild carousel ride, and many more!
- Unique Dining Experience: Start your day well with this iconic dining experience designed to inspire a love for wildlife and delight your senses!
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Singapore Zoo's official website for any updates

Accessibility: Wheelchair, stroller, and electric scooters accessible.

SkyPark Observation Deck at Marina Bay Sands 滨海湾金沙空中花园

Sitting atop the 56-story megastructure, the SkyPark Observation Deck gives you a view of the best sites of Lion City unobstructed! Step into the building’s giant platform and easily spot landmarks such as the Singapore Flyer, Merlion Statue, and Esplanade, among others, through its clear glass railings. See Gardens by the Bay stand out from the rest of the city and the Spectra show lighting up the night from a 200-feet elevation. Afterwards, you can opt to dine at a rooftop restaurant while you enjoy the iconic sights.
Incredible views of Singapore
A fantastic place to have a drink and enjoy great city and bay garden views
Take in a bird’s-eye view of Gardens by the Bay and the impressive Supertree Grove, or spot Singapore's iconic landmarks from above.

Take in a bird’s-eye view of Gardens by the Bay and the impressive Supertree Grove, or spot Singapore's iconic landmarks from above. Admire the durian-shaped domes of the Esplanade and catch a glimpse of the Merlion.

Snow City Singapore

Brave the sub-zero chill right here in Singapore with family and friends. The Singapore Snow City is the first of its kind to bring the Arctic here to the tropics.Snow City is Singapore's first indoor snow centre located within the Science Centre, Singapore area beside Ommi-Theatre in Jurong East. Snow City introduces the concept of snow and cold climates in a fun, entertaining and educational way. Introduce your kids to the Inuits’ way of life with life-sized igloos in the Arctic Snow Playground and ice fishing at The Mezzanine. Experience snowfall at The Upper Mezzanine level. Head down to the Arctic Snow Slide for a thrilling three-storey high ride down.
Experience the thrill of the Arctic with life-sized igloos and ice fishing.
Witness enchanting snowfall in a tropical setting at the Upper Mezzanine level.
Brave the Arctic Snow Slide for an exhilarating three-story ride down.

Escape the Singapore heat and experience winter fun at Snow City! This one-of-a-kind attraction, located within the Science Centre, offers a frosty adventure at -5°C. Learn about snow and cold climates through interactive exhibits. Kids will love exploring life-sized igloos, simulating ice fishing, and witnessing real snowfall. Take a thrilling ride down the 3-story Arctic Snow Slide for an unforgettable experience!

Get an adrenaline rush on cutting-edge rides like Battlestar Galactica: HUMAN vs. CYLON™, TRANSFORMERS The Ride: The Ultimate 3D Battle, while the little ones laugh along to Sesame Street Spaghetti Space Chase. New York: Walk the sidewalks of the Big Apple and experience the energy of NYC, just as you've seen it in the movies.
Sci-Fi City: Explore this action-packed futuristic metropolis, home to adrenaline rides
Ancient Egypt: Step back into 1920s Egypt and explore ancient obelisks, the riddles of the Sphinx and curse-ridden rides.
The Lost World: Walk with dinosaurs in Jurassic Park and watch death-defying stunts at WaterWorld's sensational water show.
Far Far Away: Step into the fairytale kingdom of Far Far Away with castles, green ogres, a talking donkey and magic potions.
6 Themed Zones
- Hollywood: Stroll down the Walk of Fame on Hollywood Boulevard and onto the sets of your favourite blockbuster movies.
- New York: Walk the sidewalks of the Big Apple and experience the energy of NYC, just as you've seen it in the movies.
- Sci-Fi City: Explore this action-packed futuristic metropolis, home to adrenaline rides including TRANSFORMERS The Ride: The Ultimate 3D battle and Battlestar Galactica: HUMAN vs. CYLON.
- Ancient Egypt: Step back into 1920s Egypt and explore ancient obelisks, the riddles of the Sphinx and curse-ridden rides.
- The Lost World: Walk with dinosaurs in Jurassic Park and watch death-defying stunts at WaterWorld's sensational water show.
- Far Far Away: Step into the fairytale kingdom of Far Far Away with castles, green ogres, a talking donkey and magic potions.

Wild Wild Wet

Visit Wild Wild Wet, one of Singapore's largest water parks, located in Downtown East. This unique water park is one of the most popular attractions near downtown Singapore and was voted 5th in the Top 10 Water Parks in Asia category during the TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice awards in 2020.
Free Fall: Asia's Longest Water Slides. Take the plunge down a near-vertical drop.
Jacuzzi Pool & Spa in Water Park: Fluid jets to rub and ease the kinks in your muscles plus a bubbly massage that soothes your aches.
Kidz Zone: Water Park for Children. Exhilarating pint-sized versions of the big rides.
Kraken Racers: Mat Racer Water Slide. Singapore's first four-lane mat racer slide.
Water Park Rides & Attractions
- Free Fall: Asia's Longest Water Slides. Take the plunge down a near-vertical drop.
- Jacuzzi Pool & Spa in Water Park: Fluid jets to rub and ease the kinks in your muscles plus a bubbly massage that soothes your aches.
- Kidz Zone: Water Park for Children. Exhilarating pint-sized versions of the big rides.
- Kraken Racers: Mat Racer Water Slide. Singapore's first four-lane mat racer slide.

Langkawi Cable Car (SkyCab)

Prepare for a visit to Langkawi's premier geo-theme park, Panorama Langkawi, with this combo ticket offering a day of fun activities. With SkyCab's base located in the Oriental Village, you'll be nestled in some of Southeast Asia's most ancient natural scenery! With your SkyCab cable car ticket, step into a SkyCab car for the ultimate mountain views in the area. Ride up Machincang mountain and reach an elevation of over 650 meters. Once up high, you'll witness SkyBridge, a suspended bridge with transparent pathing that offers visitors close-up views of the surrounding treetops.
Prepare for a visit to Langkawi's premier geo-theme park, Panorama Langkawi, with this combo ticket offering a day of fun activities.
With SkyCab's base located in the Oriental Village, you'll be nestled in some of Southeast Asia's most ancient natural scenery!
With your SkyCab cable car ticket, step into a SkyCab car for the ultimate mountain views in the area.

Hovering over jungle and climbing over 550 million years old rock, SkyCab gives you more than one unique experience. Be informed, SkyCab is located at the oldest part of South East Asia and the first to emerge from the ancient sea and estuary! That’s something to give a goose bump if you can get the gist. Come and experience it yourself.

The Base Station is conveniently located at the foothill of the Machincang mountain. From here, visitors will be taken up to the cool Machincang mountain via the cable car system. The ride will be an exhilarating experience for everyone to enjoy. You will also be able to catch a glimpse of the flora and fauna that surrounds the area.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Panorama Langkawi official website for any updates
Weather: Skycab operation fully depend on weather condition and wind speed

A'famosa Melaka

A’Famosa Melaka is one of Malaysia’s most popular integrated resorts, offering a wide range of attractions suitable for families, couples, and groups. Located in Alor Gajah, Melaka, it combines theme parks, wildlife experiences, and leisure facilities in one destination.Visitors can enjoy thrilling water rides, exciting animal encounters, and relaxing resort surroundings, making it an ideal getaway for both short trips and extended stays.
A’ Famosa Water Theme Park: One of the largest water parks in Malaysia, built among lush greeneries.
A’ Famosa Safari Wonderland: This safari wonderland is a place where you will be able to see and interact with wild and rare animals.
Big Ice Cream: One of the tallest, longest and widest ICE CREAM in Southeast Asia with its heights of 20.8 meter, the widest diameter length of 18.3 meter.
Wahaha / Hulala : Experience a  ride resembling a tsuname-like effect.

Expect a full day of fun and leisure with a mix of thrilling rides, interactive experiences, and relaxing spaces. The park is designed for guests of all ages, with clearly marked zones, food outlets, rest areas, and amenities throughout the resort.Guests should be prepared for walking between areas and are encouraged to plan their visit according to the attraction operating hours. Some attractions may have height, age, or safety restrictions.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit A'Famosa Malacca official website for any updates of operation hours.

Adventure Waterpark Desaru Coast

Head on over to Desaru Resort Waterpark with your family and friends, and prepare yourself for a splashingly good time! Explore the waterpark's five zones, each featuring different levels of rides. Explore a setting filled with intrigue, pirates, and young heroes at Penawar Falls. With the classic Swinging Ship and with multiple waterfalls tumbling over rising cliffs into a pond below, this zone is sure to capture the attention of both young and old alike. Ride along the long, looping, lazy Penawar River that floats amid the lush greenery of fishing village scenes and experience four giant water slides — the Wild Whirl, Super Twister, Riptide, and Temptest!
The park is set against the backdrop of a traditional Malaysian fishing village.
It is home to one of the world’s largest wave pools.
It features the first-ever water coaster in the region.
The park offers more than 20 wet and dry rides, slides, and attractions.

Explore five exciting zones at Desaru Coast Adventure Waterpark. Enjoy family-friendly rides like the Swinging Ship and Surf Wall at Penawar Falls, float along the 350m Penawar River with giant slides, and feel the thrill at Shipwreck Reef with Kraken’s Revenge. Splash around at the massive Tidal Wave Beach wave pool or relax at beachside cabanas. For younger guests, Kids Ahoy offers safe, fun-filled play areas with multiple slides and water features designed for toddlers to early teens.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Adventure Waterpark Desaru Coast official website for any updates of operation hours.

Dresscode: Cotton t-shirts and tracksuits are NOT allowed in all water slides, pools and wave pool.
Dresscode: Babies and toddlers are required to wear swim diapers or swim pants.
Accessibility: Wheelchairs are available in the Waterpark. Please reach out to the personnel at the Guest Service Counter for further assistance.

Riverine Splash is a tribal-themed waterpark designed with lush landscape & fun rides for all ages. Keep your entire family entertained, ride our Boa and Anaconda Tube slides to get your adrenaline pumping or take a relaxing cruise along our Rimba River and immerse yourself in the sights and sounds of nature at its best.
The park offers an array of slides, rides, and relaxing attractions for all ages.
It features adrenaline-pumping slides with rainbow colours as you slide down.
The park includes a Waveball pool, one of the first in Malaysia.
The Batufall (waterfall) is a safe and ideal place for couples or families to chill together.

At Amverton Riverine Splash, immerse yourself in a world of aquatic fun, family entertainment, and relaxation, promising a day filled with memorable water-based adventures for guests of all ages. A unique Tribal themed destination, Over 12 rides, slides & attractions.

Aquaria KLCC

Discover the wonders of the underwater world at Aquaria KLCC, a world-class oceanarium located beneath the Kuala Lumpur Convention Centre, just steps away from the iconic Petronas Twin Towers. As one of the city’s top attractions, Aquaria KLCC offers an immersive marine experience in the heart of Kuala Lumpur.Home to over 5,000 aquatic and land-bound creatures, the oceanarium showcases fascinating marine life from around the globe, including tiger sharks, stingrays, sea snakes, seahorses, jellyfish, and more. Interactive zones allow visitors to enjoy close-up encounters with selected species, making the visit both educational and exciting.One of the main highlights is the spectacular 90-meter underwater tunnel, where you can walk through a transparent glass walkway surrounded by sharks, rays, and other marine creatures swimming overhead. Don’t miss the touch pool experience, where you can gently interact with starfish and sea cucumbers.
One of the Top Five Aquariums in Asia: Aquaria KLCC is recognized as one of the top five aquariums in Asia.
Impressive Exhibits: It showcases over 5,000 land and aquatic creature exhibits spread over a sprawling 60,000 sq ft square.
Underwater Journey: You can take the longest underwater tunnel in Malaysia that showcases some iconic Malaysian species.
Conservation Efforts: Aquaria KLCC has taken steps in providing conservation solutions which will help make our oceans healthier.
Exhibitions
Evolution zone: Red-bellied Piranha
Touch pool: Red-bellied Piranha, Brown-banded Bamboo Shark & Horseshoe Crab
Jewels of Jungle: Asian Small-clawed Otter, Electric Eel & Tokay Gecko
Shipwreck: Red Lionfish & Reef Stonefish
The Stream: Asian Small-clawed Otter
Station Aquarius: Moon Jelly & Seahorse
Flooded Forest: Arapaima & Alligator Garfish
The Coastal: Archerfish & Giant Mudskipper
Living Ocean: Sand Tiger Shark, Green Sea Turtle & Giant Moray Eel
Weird and Wonderful: Pinecone Fish
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Aquaria KLCC official website for any updates of operation hours.
Weather: Indoor attraction with no wet weather restrictions.
Dresscode: Casual wear recommended.
Accessibility: Aquaria KLCC have wheelchairs for rental.

Berjaya Times Square Theme Park

Experience endless fun and excitement at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park, a world-class indoor amusement park located within one of Kuala Lumpur’s largest shopping malls. Enjoy adrenaline-pumping rides like the Supersonic Odyssey suspended roller coaster and thrilling Go-Kart racing, alongside family-friendly attractions in the Kids’ Zone with colorful rides and safe play areas.The Experience Pass offers unlimited access to rides and attractions, plus entertainment in the arcade filled with games for all ages. With flexible single- or multi-day passes, dining options, and shopping just steps away, it’s the perfect destination for thrill-seekers, families, and friends looking for an action-packed day indoors.
Experience heart-pounding excitement with a variety of thrilling rides at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park.
Challenge your friends and family to a thrilling race on our exhilarating Go-Kart track, where speed and skill will determine the victor.
For the younger ones, the Kids' Zone offers a magical and enchanting experience.
Step into our Arcade section and discover a world of entertainment and gaming.

Experience heart-racing attractions like Supersonic Odyssey, a suspended roller coaster with twists, turns, and high-speed excitement, plus an exhilarating Go-Kart track for friendly competition.Younger visitors can enjoy the dedicated Kids’ Zone, including the charming Fantasy Garden with colorful rides, interactive play areas, and a safe, magical environment designed just for them.Step into the Arcade for skill-based games, shooting galleries, and the latest video game experiences—perfect for all ages.Enjoy unlimited rides and attractions with flexible ticket options, including single-day and multi-day passes, so you can make the most of your visit.Located inside Berjaya Times Square shopping mall, the park offers easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment—ideal for taking breaks between thrills.
The theme park offers varying levels of accessibility for guests with disabilities.
Some rides at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park have minimum height requirements for safety reasons.
Pregnant women are generally advised to avoid rides with intense movements or sudden drops.
Wear light, breathable clothing and comfortable closed-toe shoes or sneakers, as you’ll be walking a lot and enjoying fast-paced rides and attractions.
Avoid loose accessories, dangling jewelry, slippers, or high heels to ensure safety and comfort while participating in rides and activities.

Crocodile Adventureland Langkawi

Crocodile Adventureland is home to around 4,000 young and mature species of crocodile, including Tomistoma, Siamese, Guinea, and the Saltwater Crocodile. The farm is also home to 'Bujang Lang', one of the world's largest crocodiles in captivity weighing in at 1,000 kilograms. Engage in several activities including crocodile feeding and fishing, and come virtually face to face with life sized, crocodile like dinosaurs, in an interactive experience powered by animatronics technology.
Largest Collection of Crocodiles: The park is home to nearly 4000 crocodiles from various species such as Tomistoma, Siamese, Guinea, and Saltwater crocodile.
Educational and Entertaining: The park combines entertainment & education, featuring live shows that highlight the strength and agility of these reptiles.
Interactive Activities: The park offers interactive activities such as juvenile crocodile fishing and feeding.
Awards and Recognition: ‘Outstanding Eco Adventure Park’ by MyMalaysia Tourism in 2023."

Dive into the heart of natural wonders at Treetopia and Crocodile Adventureland Langkawi, where your photography skills come alive. In the tranquil embrace of Treetopia, capture the elegance of towering trees and vibrant blooms. Explore the hanging bridge and embrace the beautiful scenery of mountains. Share your visual journey on social media, hashtag Treetopia Langkawi and tag Crocodile Adventureland Langkawi social media. Let your lens tell the story, and don't forget to tag us for a chance to be featured!
While some paved pathways exist, navigating the park with a wheelchair might be challenging.
Accessibility: The crocodile feeding shows can involve loud noises and sudden movements, which might be overwhelming for visitors with sensory sensitivities.
Restriction: Food and drinks are not permitted inside the crocodile enclosures.
What’s included: 2 x pellet (Juvenile Crocodile Feeding)

Dickson Dragon Cruise

Introducing the Dickson Dragon, a remarkable Trimaran Pontoon boat designed and crafted in the beautiful shores of Phuket, Thailand. With a maximum capacity of 60 passengers, we invite you to indulge in a cruise like no other.Set sail along the mesmerizing Port Dickson coastline, a hidden gem known for its enchanting sunsets. Immerse yourself in the captivating beauty of the Straits of Melaka as the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky with vibrant hues of orange and gold.But that's not all! Feast your senses on our delectable BBQ Grill, where succulent grilled meats sizzle to perfection. Indulge in a mouth-watering culinary experience as you relish the flavours of the sea and the savoury aroma of grilled goodness. (Note: Pre order your BBQ during booking)Get ready to let loose and dance the night away! Our Karaoke Machine, dazzling disco lights, and powerful speakers will elevate your experience to new heights. Sing your heart out, show off your dance moves, and create memories that will last a lifetime.Take relaxation to the next level with our unique saltwater jacuzzi experience. Lounge on our floating net, dip your toes in the refreshing waters, and let gentle waves create a soothing sensation. It's pure bliss as you unwind and soak up the magic of the sea.Looking to celebrate a special event? The Dickson Dragon is your perfect venue. Whether it's a birthday, wedding, reunion, or team building program, our exceptional boat sets the stage for unforgettable moments. Create cherished memories as you celebrate in style on the picturesque waters of Port Dickson.At the Dickson Dragon Sunset Cruise, we strive to offer you an affordable cruise experience that exceeds your expectations. As the sun sets, we a blessed with awe-inspiring vistas that will leave you breathless, capturing the true essence of Port Dickson's beauty.Join us on the Dickson Dragon Sunset Cruise and let us transport you to a world of wonder, excitement, and pure joy. Book your unforgettable experience today and embark on a journey that will leave you with cherished memories for years to come.

Imagine the sky ablaze with vibrant colors as you capture breathtaking panoramic views.

Dream Forest Langkawi

An Enchanting Rainforest Night WalkWhere legends come to lifeAs night falls, travellers are invited to enter the Dream Forest Book Portal and into the magical realm of Sang Gedembai, the legendary keeper of stories and Guardian of the Forest.Stroll along a leisurely 1.2km trail to discover tales like the bittersweet love story of Dayang Bunting Lake, the fabled battle between mighty warrior Merong Mahawangsa and his nemesis Garuda, and… did you know Langkawi was once the home of GIANTS? Immerse yourself in their stories through mesmerising lights, music, projection mapping, art installations, interactive activities and narration.Created by Tiara Jacquelina and the award-winning team at Enfiniti - storytelling, cutting-edge technology and nature come together to create an unforgettable experience.Are you ready for a magical journey?
Stroll along a leisurely 1.2km trail to discover Langkawi's mythical tales, brought to life through mesmerising lights, music, projection mapping
The 14 different zones are carefully designed around the natural environment and tell stories about Langkawi's rich history and folklore including the Legend.
This magical multi-sensory adventure is perfect for families with children of all ages.
There are discounts for Langkawi residents, MyKad holders, and senior citizens.
The park is open daily from 7pm to 12am, except for Wednesdays (unless it is a public or school holiday).

Escape the ordinary and enter a world of wonder on Langkawi's Enchanting Night Walk!  Step through a dreamlike portal and embark on a leisurely stroll through the rainforest. Uncover captivating local legends like the star-crossed lovers of Dayang Bunting Lake and the epic battle between Merong Mahawangsa and Garuda.  Interactive displays, mesmerizing lights, music, and projections bring these stories to life.  Created by the award-winning Enfiniti team, this unforgettable experience blends storytelling with cutting-edge technology for a magical journey through Langkawi's myths and rainforest beauty.
Age: Best for ages 7+, parental discretion advised.
Food/Drinks: Bring water, check for cafes on-site.
Photography: Flash restrictions may apply.

Entopia

Imagine nature’s largest classroom and discovery hub, where butterflies and insects are free to come out and play. Within Entopia lies two worlds; The Natureland living outdoor gardens and The Cocoon indoor discovery centre. Over 150 species of fauna and more than 200 species of flora are being showcased throughout Entopia’s entire exhibition. Entopia is a nature discovery and exploration center located in Teluk Bahang, Penang, Malaysia. The center is dedicated to promoting awareness and appreciation of the natural world, particularly the insects and other invertebrates that play important roles in maintaining ecological balance.Entopia is housed in a large greenhouse-like structure that spans more than 100,000 square feet. Within the center, visitors can explore a variety of exhibits and displays, including live insect displays, interactive educational exhibits, and immersive habitats that simulate different ecosystems and natural environments.One of the center's main attractions is its butterfly sanctuary, which is home to over 15,000 free-flying butterflies from more than 200 species. Visitors can stroll through the sanctuary and observe the butterflies as they flit among the flowers and foliage, or even participate in guided tours and hands-on activities.In addition to its butterfly sanctuary, Entopia also features a variety of other exhibits and attractions, including a bug exploration zone, a learning lab, a Thai water garden, and more. The center is open year-round and is a popular destination for families, nature enthusiasts, and anyone interested in learning more about the amazing diversity and beauty of the natural world.
Natureland: This living garden vivarium is a shared ecological space for a variety of animals from invertebrates and reptiles living in their re-created natural
It is one of the largest butterfly gardens in Malaysia with approximately 15,000 free-flying butterflies at any one time consisting of up to 60 species.
The living garden features more than 200 species of plants with waterfalls, ponds, caves, and other artistic garden features.
The Cocoon: This indoor discovery center is designed to let visitors self-explore the world of invertebrates through various interactive edu-stations.
Some of its exciting attractions include the Pandora Forest, Metamorphosis, Lumino City, Downtown Entopia, Breeding Ground, Underground Mysteries, etcs.
Nature Learning Activities:
- The Natureland: The Natureland, which is a living garden vivarium, is a shared ecological space for a variety of animals from invertebrates and reptiles living in their re-created natural habitat.
- The Cocoon: The Cocoon features two floors of learning exhibitions and indoor activities.
- Nature Talk: Join the Nature Activity Team as they share their passion for nature with you!

- Vita Nova: How do we do it? By releasing newly-emerged butterflies, witnessing their very first flight and watching them dance gracefully in our enchanting aviary. This one-of-a-kind experience will guarantee to be the highlight of your day!
- Bug Exploration: Explore with us as we discover the interesting lives of our amazing animal friends and catch glimpses of our Bug Exploration superstars.
- Special Appearance: You might grab a chance to meet our superstars! Come and capture your magical moments with them.

- Butterfly Race: Discover mother nature by challenging yourself to complete the race. You’ll be seeking out the different butterflies here in the garden and also stand a chance to win yourself a limited edition gift!

Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible.
Butterflies are not visible or active at night, as they rest after sunset. Entopia By Night focuses on biofluorescence and nocturnal discoveries.
Entopia By Night is exclusively an outdoor garden experience. Indoor Discovery Centre (Cocoon) and Entopia Store will remain closed from 6:00pm onwards.
Visitors are advised to check the weather forecast before purchasing tickets and bring umbrellas to enjoy the garden walk comfortably in case of rain.

ESCAPE Penang

Visit ESCAPE Penang, an unforgettable place with fun for everyone. Choose from 40 thrilling rides, obstacle courses, and waterslides that come in different difficulty levels and are located throughout the two main areas of the park. Head to Escape Adventureplay for the best ziplining, climbing, and obstacle course experiences on land, or make your way to Escape Waterplay for the opportunity to experience a Guinness World Record-winning tube waterslide and daunting diving towers.
ESCAPE Penang has fulfilled its vision of creating an adventure park that’s both fun and environmentally-friendly, combining excitement with conservation.
The park is located in a wild, natural, and intrepid location, surrounded by lush tropical hills.
If we want children to protect nature, they must first fall in love with nature, ESCAPE Greenie Program inspired Malaysian youth to love nature.
Over 35 Rides and Attractions: ESCAPE offers a wide range of activities that involve zipping, swinging, jumping, and balancing through the jungle canopy.
Adventure Camping Experience: You can stay at the ESCAPE BASE CAMP, which is a beautiful & fully equipped jungle campsite.

Farm In The City

An Eden of Nature and Animals Farm In The City (FITC) is a unique new concept that combines elements of wildlife and nature set in a designed environment of a conservation park. Drawing upon the values of Malaysia’s multi-racial and multi-cultural population, FITC is designed to resemble a typical Malaysia village or “kampung” setting. FITC plans to become a focal point for tourism in the state by providing educational and entertaining insight into the lifestyle and setting of a Malaysian village, farm and fruit orchard with its natural plants and wildlife. FITC is much more than a viewing exhibit. It encourages visitor-interactions with the animals and plant-life in a comfortable yet authentic environment. FITC also places great importance on education of visitors on the various aspects of farm and animal life as well as wildlife conservation and preservation.
Feed and interact with Giant Tortoise Species
Chance to interact with more than 100 species of tame and exotic animals
Featuring more than 300 individual birds for all around the world
Be amazed with more than 100 Malaysian birds in free-flight
Summon thousands of Koi fish by ringing a bell

Get up close with friendly goats and sheep, watch playful chickens peck around their coop, and learn about the importance of sustainable urban agriculture.  Farm in the City offers interactive workshops and educational talks, allowing you to participate in planting activities, understand the farm-to-table concept, and gain a deeper appreciation for local food production.Beyond the animals and workshops, Farm in the City provides a peaceful escape from the city's hustle and bustle.  Wander through scenic gardens, relax amidst greenery, and enjoy the fresh air.  The farm also boasts a charming on-site cafe where you can savor delicious meals prepared using fresh, locally sourced ingredients, often grown right there on the farm.  Farm in the City provides a unique opportunity to reconnect with nature, learn about sustainable practices, and create lasting memories in an unexpected urban oasis.

Genting Highlands Premium Outlets Cable Car (Previously Known as Awana SkyWay)

Hop aboard a crystal-clear cable car at Awana Station and enjoy a scenic 10-minute gondola ride up to Genting Highlands. As you glide through the sky, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the surrounding mountains, lush rainforest, and tall pagodas emerging from the greenery along the way.You can also stop at Chin Swee Station to visit the famous Chin Swee Caves Temple, a Taoist temple located in the Genting Highlands. Capture photos of iconic landmarks such as the 9-storey grand pagoda, the Sky Terrace, and the impressive 15-meter-tall Buddha statue. Upon arrival at Genting Highlands, explore a wide range of attractions, luxury hotels, shopping outlets, and exciting theme parks.
Fly up in just 10 minutes: The gondola lift system takes you from the Awana Station at mid-hill to the SkyAvenue Station at the peak.
Chin Swee Caves Temple: With the same ticket, you get a free stop at the Chin Swee Station, where you can explore the beautiful Chin Swee Caves Temple.
Offers stunning 360-degree views of surrounding rainforest.

Fly up in just 10 minutes from the Awana Station at mid-hill to the SkyAvenue Station at the peak. With the same ticket, you get a free stop at the Chin Swee Station, where you can explore the beautiful Chin Swee Caves Temple and its magnificent surroundings at no extra cost.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Awana SkyWay official website for any updates of operation hours.
Restrictions: Please be reminded that each passenger is allowed to bring one aircraft cabin size bag into the gondola. A surcharge will be imposed otherwise.
Restrictions: Each Standard Gondola can seat 10 passengers, including children. Glass floor gondolas can seat 6 passengers.
Restrictions: Child with the height below 90cm entitles for a free ride.
Dresscode: Please dress in appropriate attire at all times while taking the ride with Awana SkyWay.
Dresscode: Please be reminded to bring a mask as it is compulsory to wear a face mask when on board the Awana SkyWay.
Accessibility: Wheelchair and stroller access are available for Standard Gondola. Only baby strollers are allowed in the Glass floor gondolas.

Genting Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park

Head to the Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park in First World Plaza for an exciting, all-day adventure! Embrace the thrills and frills of the park, surrounded by beautiful Genting Highlands. Start your adventure by exploring the expansive indoor theme park. Test your limits and make sure to hop on one of their many exhilarating rides. Spin around on their colorful Royal Carousel or take a heart-stopping plunge on the Sky Towers at gravity-defying speeds. The possibilities are endless!Rides Introduction:Family Rides:Jumping Spurs - A mini-jumping tower featuring gentle drops and climbs, designed for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 92cm and 122cm in height.Boo Boo Bump - A fun miniature bumper car ride where children can gently bump their way around. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 105cm and 140cm in height.Ride ‘Em Round - A classic merry-go-round with seats that move up and down, perfect for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 90cm and 122cm in height.Copper Express - A family-friendly open-top train ride with mild curves. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Tea Cups - An oversized spinning tea cup ride offering multiple twirling motions for the whole family. Riders under 105cm in height are not permitted. Children between 105cm and 130cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Chariot Cruise - A family-friendly flying cruise that loops around the park. Riders under 110cm or over 195cm in height are not permitted. Children between 110cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Adventure Rides:Loop de Loop - A miniature track ride with gentle curves and slopes, designed for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 90cm and 122cm in height.Balloon Race - A family-friendly balloon ride featuring fast spins and twirls. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Royal Carousel - A grand, double-story carousel adorned with intricately carved horses and chariots. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Space Cadets - A family-friendly ride with controllable flying motions, allowing guests to pilot their own adventure. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Soaring Ships - A suspended ride that offers breathtaking aerial views of the park, perfect for the whole family. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Sky Towers - An exhilarating drop tower ride that plunges at gravity-defying speeds. Riders under 105cm in height are not permitted. Children between 105cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Skyscraper - A towering Ferris wheel with colorful gondolas, offering a magnificent panoramic view of the park. Riders under 90cm in height are not permitted. Children between 90cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Thrill Rides:Disco! - A gigantic spinning disc that swings back and forth while rotating rapidly, gaining speed as it travels. Riders under 122cm in height are not permitted.Spin Crazy - An extreme spinning pendulum that soars through the air with thrilling 360-degree rotations. Riders under 130cm or over 195cm in height are not permitted.Super Glider - A suspended lie-down coaster featuring sharp turns, sudden drops, and high-speed curves—perfect for thrill-seekers. Riders under 135cm in height are not permitted.Power Surge - A high-intensity ride with wild spinning motions and upside-down thrills. Riders under 122cm in height are not permitted.Music Express - A fast-spinning ride with sudden slopes, twirling motion, and a thrilling backward surge. Riders under 130cm in height are not permitted. Children between 130cm and 140cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Bumper Boss - A dynamic bumper car arena where guests can unleash their inner racer. Riders under 120cm in height are not permitted. Children between 120cm and 130cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.

Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park

Enjoy a fun day at Genting SkyWorlds theme park with this day pass! Explore all 9 uniquely-themed worlds and make sure to hop on the 26 rides and attractions. Bring the whole family for a full day of fun and adventure!
Explore all 9 uniquely-themed worlds and make sure to hop on the 26 rides and attractions.
Rides and Attractions: The major rides you should prioritize are Planet of the Apes, Independence Day, Acorn Adventure, and the Epic water ride.
Robots Rivet Town: Assemble for non-stop family fun in the vibrant world of Robots!
Ice Age: A pre-historic adventure with attractions inspired by the globally recognized franchise, Ice Age.
Central Park: Gather in the buzzing town square to experience the best of world-class attractions, dining, retail and live entertainment.
Explore Our Worlds:

- Studio Plaza: Begin the day's adventure at the majestic Studio Plaza. As a celebration of all things cinema, find your favourite movie characters in all shapes and forms - carved into the golden interiors, displayed at the 360° Legends Cinema or as collectibles in our exciting dining and retail stores!

- Eagle Mountain: Step into the heat of a Californian desert right here at Eagle Mountain. As Torque and Wrench prepare for the infamous race of Mad Ramp Peak, grab a burger or two from the food trucks nearby or have a browse around the industrial themed Freedom Shop!

- Central Park: Gather in the buzzing town square to experience the best of world-class attractions, dining, retail and live entertainment. Whether it's a visit to the Natural History Museum or the marvellous fountain show at the Lake of Dreams, Central Park is where fun, excitement and memory-lasting moments meet.
- Andromed Base: In this thrilling galactic escapade, your survival on Andromeda Base is put to the test in various challenges, including the looming Terraform Tower of terror!

- Liberty Lane: Inspired by the streets of San Francisco, this thriving neighbourhood comes to life with unique stores, food locations, and an exhilarating attraction from Planet of the Apes – a first-in-the-world, designed exclusively for Genting SkyWorlds.
- Robots Rivet Town: Assemble for non-stop family fun in the vibrant world of Robots!
- Ice Age: A pre-historic adventure with attractions inspired by the globally recognized franchise, Ice Age. Experience mammoth-sized fun for everyone in the family!

Glass Museum Penang

Glass Museum Penang achieved 2 records in The Malaysia Book of Records : “ The First Glass Museum” & “Longest Batik Motive Glass Painting”. The museum specialized in Fused Glass, Sandblasted Glass, Batik Glass & Creative Art Glass. The museum turn glass into unique decoration products,like glass key chain, clock,deco products,glass jewelry and even customized glass gifts.
Penang's first & only glass museum,2 Malaysia Book of Records holder (The first Glass Museum & The Longest Motive Glass Painting)
Visiting tour including a pcs of glass bottle art, all painting material are provided in the museum.
Visitor can DIY designs & paint colors on the glass, & can get back on the spot.
Internal tour guides are available, short decription will be provided.
Beside, visitor can enjoy the visiting tour with glass wall arts & take photos with glass wall arts. No time limits.
Here are some things you can expect to see and experience when visiting the museum:

- Exhibits showcasing the history of glass: The museum features exhibits that trace the history of glassmaking from ancient times to the present day. You can learn about the techniques used to create glass objects and see examples of different styles and types of glass.

- Glass art displays: The museum has a collection of beautiful glass art pieces, including sculptures, vases, and other decorative items. These pieces are created by local and international glass artists and showcase the versatility of glass as an art medium.
- Interactive displays: The museum has interactive displays that allow visitors to learn more about the properties of glass and the techniques used to create it.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Glass Museum Penang official website for any updates of operation hours.
Weather: Indoor attraction with no wet weather restrictions]

Jump Street Asia

Defy gravity here at Jump Street Asia!Welcome to Malaysia's biggest trampoline park, with over 34,000 square feet of trampolines at the heart of the Klang Valley. It is also home to 6 Olympic-grade trampolines! It's definitely not a place to be missed! Opened since 2014, Jump Street Asia have brought smiles to people of all ages. We cater to events such as birthday parties, school trips, corporate team building and many more!After your visit here, somebody's gotta pick up a few tricks or two right?
Jump, Tap & Score: Test your reflexes and response! The highest points win.
High Performance: Prepare for a show! Watch the coach pull tricks.
Street Soccer: In case you’re bored of trampolines, let’s play a friendly game of football.
Zipline: Take flight at Zipline! An attraction we’re all waiting for.

Kidzania Kuala Lumpur

Step inside KidZania Kuala Lumpur, an interactive indoor theme park that allows children to experience their dream job through role-playing activities!This activity center is designed to look like a replica of the world we live in, with paved roads, operating vehicles, and actual buildings. The city plan of this metropolis includes several different “establishments”, such as a hospital, police station, fire station, supermarket, beauty salon, radio station, theater, and more! Other than that, visitors will also be able to find locations that offer food & beverage, merchandise, and media, so that they will be able to have the time of their lives in this miniature city!
The park is designed to look like a replica of the world we live in, with paved roads, operating vehicles, and actual buildings.
KidZania Kuala Lumpur offers over 60 establishments with more than 100 activities, where children can perform real-life jobs in a simulated, role-play.
Kids can learn about what it takes to be a firefighter, construction worker, police officer, fashion designer, and more.
KidZania Kuala Lumpur is a great opportunity for kids to learn about the economic cycle starting from a young age, which will better prepare them for the future
Enjoy Kidzania Kuala Lumpur:
- Activities: KidZania has over 60 role-play activities for kids aged 4 - 14 to explore. Pilot, surgeon, firefighter, chef, magician - we have it all!
- School Trips: Kids learn best when they are enjoying themselves, and KidZania lets kids learn about life beyond the classroom through role-play.
- Birthday Parties: Have birthday memories at KidZania Kuala Lumpur with a party in in our interactive city by kids and for kids.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Kidzania Kuala Lumpur official website for any updates of operation hours.

KL Hop On Hop Off Pass

Let us take you through every aspect of Kuala Lumpur - from the high-rise buildings and skyscrapers to the historical places and green scenery in this attractive and recreational tour. Worry no more, as you can be the timekeeper for your own travel. KL Hop On Hop Off is the ONLY OPEN TOP Double Deck bus in Kuala Lumpur, with lively guides and helpful ground crew to assist you during the tour. It's also famous as the main transport that connects to more than 60 sites and attractions in Kuala Lumpur and is recognized as a tourist-friendly transportation system. With 27 designated stops, you will get to know Kuala Lumpur like never before. Red Line (City Route) - 1 loop approximately 2 hours Stop.1 - Bukit Bintang (Interchange Stop) Stop 2 - Sheraton (Jalan Sultan Ismail) Stop 3 - Seri Pacific (Putra World Trade Center - PWTC) Stop 4 - Intercontinental Stop 5 - KLCC (Petronas Twin Towers) Stop 6 - Matic (Malaysia Tourism Centre) Stop 7 - KL Tower (Menara Kuala Lumpur) Stop 8 - KL City Walk Stop 9 - Aquaria Stop 10 - Changkat (Jalan Alor) Stop 11 - Swiss Garden Stop 12 - Chinatown Green Line (Garden Routes) - 1 loop approximately 2 hours Stop 13 - Central Market Stop 14 - Dataran Merdeka (Independence Square) Stop 15 - Little India Stop 16 - KL Sentral (Transit Hub to KL International Airport) Stop 17 - National Museum Stop 18 - National Palace (King's Residence) Stop 19 - Lake Garden Stop 20 - Bird Park Stop 21 - National Mosque Stop 22 - Merdeka Square (Independence Square) Stop 23 - Medan Mara Stop 24 - Chow Kit Stop 25 - Quill City Mall Stop 26 - Concorde (Hard Rock Cafe) Stop 27 - Tribeca Hotel
Double-Decker Bus: Discover Kuala Lumpur’s major landmarks on an air-conditioned double-decker with an open top deck.
Two Routes: The service operates two routes - the City Route (Red Line) and the Garden Route (Green Line), each offering a unique set of attractions.
Audio Commentary: The service provides an English audio commentary, offering interesting insights about the city and its attractions.

KL Tower

See Kuala Lumpur’s mesmerizing landscapes from up high as you head to the observation deck of KL Tower, the 7th tallest freestanding tower in the world that rises 421 meters above ground level. Enjoy spectacular panoramic views of the city and its notorious skyscrapers. KL Tower’s Observation Deck offers unobstructed 360-degree views of Kuala Lumpur and is, without doubt, the best spot in town for taking great photos. Get your entrance tickets early and don’t waste any time in long lines. Head right to the top of Malaysia’s famous skyscraper and watch the city unfold before your eyes. Choose from the indoor Observation Deck, the outdoor Sky Deck or, if you dare, the completely glass Sky Box which extends on a ledge from the Sky Deck!
Sky Deck: An observation deck that offers a stunning view of the KL skyline.
Sky Box: A glass structure suspending from the edge of the sky deck, providing an amazing bird’s eye view of Kuala Lumpur.
Jelutong Tree: A notable attraction within the KL Tower premises.
Mini Zoo: A small zoo located at the base of the tower.
Upside Down House: An interesting attraction where everything is upside down.

Prepare to be awestruck as you reach the observation deck, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows for unobstructed vistas.  High-powered binoculars are available to get an even closer look at iconic landmarks like the Petronas Twin Towers, the Sultan Abdul Samad Building, and the KL Menara Forest Eco Park.  Thrill-seekers can even test their courage by stepping onto the transparent sky box, offering a heart-pounding walk on air with the city far below.Beyond the panoramic views, the KL Tower offers interactive exhibits that delve into the tower's history and construction.  Learn about the engineering marvel that is this skyscraper and its role in shaping Kuala Lumpur's skyline.  The tower also boasts a revolving restaurant, allowing you to enjoy a delicious meal (à la carte) while the city slowly rotates beneath you, creating an ever-changing dining experience.  Whether you're seeking breathtaking views, interactive experiences, or a unique dining opportunity, the KL Tower promises an unforgettable experience in the heart of Kuala Lumpur.
Restriction: children 4 years old and below are strictly not allowed.
Security checks are conducted for all visitors.
Dress modestly when visiting.
What’s included: 1 Observation Deck ticket(s)

Langkawi Adventure & Xtreme Park

If you’re looking for a fun day out among nature, then this attraction is for you! Set out on a journey to Langkawi and into the Kilim Geoforest Park, a UNESCO listed heritage geo site, where the Langkawi Adventure & Xtreme Park is located. Here, experience the thrill of pedaling on a bike over a suspended cable, ziplining, paintball, and go-karting, among others, while surrounded by native flora. Bring your friends along and take turns trying out exciting activities that will surely make you want to go again.You can also choose to do activities that could help you unwind, such as going on a horseback ride or visiting the unique 3D Art Museum, where you’re free to goof around. Following the park’s trails and admiring the landscape is always an option as well. There’s something for everyone at the Langkawi Adventure & Xtreme Park!
ATV Jungle Ride: An adventurous ride through the jungle on an All-Terrain Vehicle (ATV).
Jungle Horse Riding: Experience horse riding in the lush greenery of the jungle.
Flying Fox: Soar through the air on a zip-line, also known as the Flying Fox.
Indoor Go-Kart: Enjoy the thrill of racing in a safe and controlled indoor environment.
Langkawi Sky Bike: The latest addition to the park, the Sky Bike offers a unique and thrilling way to explore the park from above.

Prepare to unleash your inner explorer as you choose from over 12 exciting activities.  Take a thrilling ride on an ATV through a lush jungle landscape, weaving through muddy tracks and feeling the wind in your hair.  For a different perspective, soar through the treetops on the Sky Bike, a high-altitude cycling adventure that offers breathtaking panoramic views of the rainforest.  If you prefer terra firma, test your driving skills on the Go-Kart track, navigating tight corners and experiencing the exhilaration of a high-speed race.The park caters to more than just speed demons.  Challenge your aim with archery or test your courage on the Flying Fox zipline, soaring across a scenic valley.  For a family-friendly activity, explore the various horse riding options, suitable for both beginners and experienced riders.  Langkawi Adventure & Xtreme Park even features a 3D and 7D cinema experience, transporting you to fantastical worlds for a touch of virtual reality fun.
Accessibility: The park's overall layout with uneven terrain and limited ramps might pose challenges for visitors with wheelchairs or mobility impairments.
Restriction: Some activities, like ATV rides or the Sky Bike, have minimum age and height restrictions.
Restriction:  Large bags, backpacks, and loose items are not recommended on rides or during activities.
Restriction: Eating and drinking are not permitted within activity areas.
What’s included: Admission for 6 activities list

LEGOLAND Malaysia Resort

LEGOLAND® Malaysia Resort brings together a LEGOLAND Theme park, Water Park Hotel and SEA LIFE in one LEGO® themed location. It is the ideal family holiday destination with more than 70 hands-on rides, slides, shows and attractions. It is the first of its kind in Asia that offers comprehensive adventure, education and fun for either an action-packed day trip or a short break destination ideal for families with kids aged 2 to 12 years old. The Theme Park is divided into eight themed areas containing thrilling rides, exciting LEGO workshops, awe-inspiring Miniland where Asia’s interesting landscapes, countries and landmarks are recreated in miniature made with more than 30 million LEGO bricks. The Water Park is the largest LEGOLAND Water Park in Asia which features 20 unique slides, waves, wade pools, interactive water-play structure and Build-A-Raft River. SEA LIFE is the world’s largest international aquarium brand with more than 50 outlets in the world and it is the latest addition to LEGOLAND Malaysia Resort. This attraction will immerse all guests in an intimate and interactive journey underneath the waves. All visitors will have chance to enjoy up-close experiences with sea creatures and be inspired to learn more about our blue planet’s invaluable natural marine assets through magical storytelling, interactive displays and hands-on encounters.
LEGOLAND Malaysia is actively collaborating with the Ministry of Tourism, Arts and Culture (MOTAC) to promote Malaysia as a premier family tourism desitination.
Cultural Immersion: LEGOLAND Malaysia is planning vibrant celebrations like Lunar New Year and Hari Raya, authentically crafted with LEGO bricks.
Exceptional Value: The LEGOLAND Malaysia annual pass offers unbeatable value, with unlimited access, exclusive events, and discounts.
Enhanced Resort Experience: 2024 brings exciting additions to LEGOLAND Malaysia, including shaded structures in MINILAND.
LEGOLAND® Park: A family fun day out with awesome adventures aplenty, starting from The Beginning to the most amazing journey through 8 themed areas and over 40 shows, rides and attractions!
LEGOLAND® Water Park: Explore over 20 slides, rides and water games at the Water Park. Build-A-Raft, LEGO& Wave Pool, DUPLO® Splash Safari and many more awaits.
SEA LIFE Aquarium: Up-close ocean experiences through magical storytelling, interactive displays and hands-on encounters.
