Terms & Conditions: The duration and validity of the pass is based on the operating hours of the basic public transport system, 1-day coverage of the pass begins from your 1st usage of the pass to the end of the public transport service for that day. For timings and operational hours of the bus services, please refer to SimplyGo’s website at: https://www.simplygo.com.sg/travel-guide Usage of 2-day, 3-day, 4-day, 5-day card must be on consecutive days. Unlimited travel is only applicable for public bus and train services. The pass excludes rides on premium services such as Sentosa Express, RWS8, express buses as well as other premium and niche bus services. To use these premium services, you can add value to the card via the self-service ticketing machines or at the SimplyGo Ticket Office. Prices apply to adult and child above 0.9m in height. The 1/2/3/4/5-Day pass has a validity of 1 year from date of purchase, while the card has a validity period of 5 years from date of purchase. The Singapore Tourist Pass is non-refundable and non-returnable. One (1) Singapore Tourist Pass can only be used by one (1) person at a time. You are required to redeem the Singapore Tourist Pass within 90 days from the booking confirmation date. A QR Code will be sent in the confirmation email. For redemption, please present the QR Code to the staff at the selected ticket office or scan the QR Code at our automated STP kiosks.

Our ice rink is a premier destination for skaters of all ages and abilities. With certified coaches, a fully stocked pro shop, and a variety of programs, we offer a safe and enjoyable skating experience. Skate safely on our ice rink
Skate rentals and pro shop
Top professional coaches
Diverse programs

Experience world-class coaching and a safe, comfortable skating environment at our facility. Our team of certified and experienced coaches, many of whom have competed at the highest levels, offer personalized instruction for skaters of all ages and skill levels. Our fully stocked pro shop provides everything you need, from skate rentals and sharpening to a wide selection of equipment and apparel. We offer a variety of programs to cater to skaters of all abilities, from beginner classes to advanced training. To ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for everyone, we use a session-based ticket entry system, preventing overcrowding and providing ample space for skaters to enjoy the ice.

Breakout Escape Game Avenue K

Whether you prefer an experience that challenges your brains, your physical stamina or just want to have fun time together, we’ve got them all here! Our escape rooms and spy game missions come with many difficulty levels, a variety of physical agility requirements and also family friendly option suitable for the younger one. For the horror fans, check out Breakout’s sister brand Hauntu for a different, unique and terrifying experience.
Escape game that comes with realistic design & props, an engaging storyline that immerses you in to the gameplay.
Every theme room can accommodate between 2-8 players.
Solve exciting missions, engaging puzzles, and obstacles and escape within 55 minutes.

At Avenue K, our 5 exclusive Breakout Rooms promise an unforgettable experience with 100% original storylines and mind-bending challenges.Immersive Storylines: Each room comes with a unique theme and narrative designed to pull you into a thrilling adventure. You won’t just be solving puzzles; you’ll be part of an unfolding story.Varied Difficulty Levels: Whether you're a seasoned escape room pro or a first-time adventurer, we offer a range of difficulty levels to keep everyone on their toes. Challenge yourself or work together as a team to crack the codes.Creative & Unrepeated Puzzles: Get ready for puzzles that are as unique as they are engaging. Our rooms feature a mix of classic challenges and innovative new twists, ensuring no two experiences are ever the same.Wow-Factor Surprises: Expect the unexpected. From intricate designs to high-tech elements, our rooms are packed with surprises that will leave you in awe and make your escape room experience stand out.Teamwork & Strategy: These rooms are built for collaboration, so gather your friends, family, or colleagues and work together to unravel the mystery. The more creative and communicative your team is, the better your chances of escaping in time!
Wear comfortable clothing and shoes suitable for light movement and activity
Listen carefully to the pre-game briefing and follow the game rules set by the staff.
Arrive at least 15 minutes before your scheduled game time for briefing and instructions.

Hauntu The Curve

Set during the yesteryear of Malaysian history with stories in the 1950s, 1980s and 1990s, experience the dark history of the Colle Eastern Hotel as your night in this sinister hotel will become an experience you will not soon forget. Encounter vengeful spirits, evil agendas and mysterious hotel workers as you make your way deeper and further into the hotel.
Immerse yourself in a Mystical Dance Academy at The Curve or in a Haunted Hotel at The LINC KL!
This engaging haunted house experience is set in an old hotel that was built during the colonial era of the 1950s
Step into Hauntu M'sia First Immersive Horror Experience

This immersive horror experience is set in a prestigious dance academy during the ancient Sultanate era. You will roleplay to uncover the darkness that lurks within the academy that features Malay traditional art & performance. This engaging haunted house experience is set in an old hotel that was built during the colonial era of the 1950s. You will role-play and be guided by professional actors to discover the truth behind this sinister hotel and what lies in its dark hallways. Ep2 set in the 1950s, you are a group of tourists who are visiting the Colle Eastern hotel on the eve of the Merdeka celebrations as you’ve received a mysterious letter from a sibling inviting you to come. As the night goes on, you’ll soon uncover what dark secrets the hotel is hiding from its guests
Consider your scare tolerance - if you scare easily, this may be too intense for you.
It is recommended to be in good health and not under the influence of alcohol before participating

Hanuman World Luge

Get ready for an action-packed adventure in Hanuman World Phuket. Glide through 16 ziplines along with rappel lines, sky bridges, and spiral cases featured in the eco park. Witness panoramic views as you fly through lush canopies. Thrillseekers may opt for the intense roller zipline, which runs at a high speed through the entire park. Admire the local flora and fauna from the sky walk. Then, unwind on the trampoline-like sun bed and fruit and juice bar. Journey to Phuket for an exhilarating ziplining adventure!
With multiple ziplines of varying lengths and heights, adventurers can choose their own level of challenge and excitement.
Embark on a heart-pounding zipline journey through the treetops of Phuket's pristine rainforest.
In addition to ziplines, Hanuman World Phuket features sky bridges that traverse the canopy, offering a unique perspective of the jungle below.
Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Phuket's rainforest as you zip through the trees.
Hanuman World Phuket is an exhilarating adventure park nestled in the lush jungles of Phuket, Thailand.

Hanuman World gives you a slice of the time when the Monkey God showed that he had no limits, feared nothing, and would do everything to reach his goal. Just like a dedicated adventurer should. So whether you are an adrenaline junkie or a nature lover, or even someone seeking a unique and unforgettable experience, Hanuman World Phuket adventure zipline park is your must-visit destination. Let the thrilling zip-line adventure through the lush greenery of Phuket be your next unforgettable journey! Additionally, we also have our first Zipline Park named Flying Hanuman which is purely located next to the waterfall in Kathu,Phuket.

Jakarta Aquarium Safari

Explore the Jakarta AQuarium Safari and witness 3500 species of aquatic and non-aquatic animals. You will see various marine animals, and the aquarium also offers educational information with expert guides. Children can participate in drawing activities to enhance their creativity, and there are many other exciting attractions to enjoy. It's an ideal tourist destination for families with children, who will surely enjoy their visit.
Witness the enchanting mermaid show at "Pearl of the South Sea"!
See 3.500 land and ocean animals up close at Indonesia's largest indoor aquarium!
Try the unique process of harvesting Akoya pearls from Japan, and bring them home
Suitable for: Family Vacationer and Group Traveler

JDT Hummer Tour

Step into a world of prestige and excitement with the JDT Hummer Tour, exclusively at Stadium Sultan Ibrahim. This 10-meter-long imported Hummer limousine features JDT-themed lighting, elegant décor, premium sound systems, and plush sofa seating — offering guests a taste of true VIP luxury. During the 12-minute chauffeured ride, visitors can relax and enjoy a scenic loop around the stadium, soaking in its magnificent architecture and dazzling lights. It’s a one-of-a-kind experience that blends football pride, luxury comfort, and unforgettable photo moments in the heart of Johor.
Ride in Malaysia’s only imported luxury Hummer limousine, a true automotive icon.
Enjoy a 12-minute chauffeur-driven tour around the stunning Stadium Sultan Ibrahim.
Immerse yourself in the JDT-themed design — from lighting to seat embroidery and decor.
Relax in ultra-comfortable sofa seating with high-end sound and visual entertainment.
Capture Instagram-worthy moments with the stadium’s vibrant night lights and majestic ambiance.

Upon arrival, guests will be greeted by the friendly JDT crew and assisted onboard the ultra-long, JDT-themed Hummer limousine. The 12-minute ride takes you around the grand Stadium Sultan Ibrahim, showcasing its modern structure and vibrant surroundings in pure comfort and style. Inside, passengers can enjoy soft lighting, relaxing music, and a premium interior atmosphere that makes you feel like a VIP guest. Whether it’s day or night, the Hummer’s sleek design and the stadium’s dazzling lights create the perfect photo opportunity — making this tour an unforgettable highlight of your visit to Johor.
The JDT Hummer Tour is a shared group experience, and each trip accommodates up to 12–15 passengers. You may be grouped with other guests during busy hours.
The tour operates continuously throughout the day and evening, but actual departure times may vary depending on crowd flow and vehicle availability.
On match or event days, the ticketing counter will temporarily relocate to Parking Zone 3 — please check signage or ask staff for assistance.
Photography and videography are encouraged — flash photography is allowed, but please avoid obstructing the driver’s view.
No food, drinks, or smoking are allowed inside the vehicle.
What’s included: Tour Duration: 10 Minutes
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: At ticketing counter
How to use: Ticket Redemption Counter: Stadium Sultan Ibrahim (In front of parking zone number 5)

Terms & Conditions: Each ticket allows admission for one person only. Children below 3 years old and disabled individuals accompanying a ticket holder are admitted free of charge. (Please come to our ticket counter and mention to staff) All tickets must be redeemed and tours must commence at the JDT Hummer Tour Counter, located in front of parking zone number 5 at Stadium Sultan Ibrahim. (During home game match day, the ticketing counter will move to parking zone number 3) Any interim special event or training session from the stadium and cause the tickets that have been sold cannot be redeemed for the visit, stadium management will assist on the change of the visitor to another visit time or will proceed refund.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy

JDT Stadium Tour – Discover the Pride of JohorStep inside the home of champions and experience the heartbeat of Johor Darul Ta’zim Football Club!The JDT Stadium Tour offers an exclusive behind-the-scenes journey through one of Malaysia’s most iconic football arenas.Visitors will get the rare opportunity to explore the Players’ Lounge, Changing Rooms, Warm-up Area, Media Zone, and the World-Class Football Pitch, where unforgettable moments are made.Interactive Experience: Engage with immersive displays featuring JDT’s iconic moments, championship trophies, and vibrant fan culture, bringing the club’s legacy to life.Walk through the players’ tunnel, feel the energy of the stadium, and stand pitch-side where football history is written.Whether you’re a passionate football fan or an inspired visitor, the JDT Stadium Tour promises an unforgettable journey of sportsmanship, pride, and the spirit of Johor.
Players’ Lounge – A premium space designed for comfort and recovery, where players unwind, dine, and connect before and after the match.
Changing Room – Professionally equipped for preparation, shower, and tactical discussions — the team’s inner sanctum before battle.
Warm-up Room – A focused environment for pre-match stretches and physical readiness, ensuring peak performance on the field.
Football Pitch – A world-class natural grass arena where passion, teamwork, and sporting excellence come alive.
Media & Medical Zone – Featuring a professional interview room and a fully equipped medical facility to support player welfare and media coverage.

Get ready for an exclusive behind-the-scenes journey into the heart of Johor Darul Ta’zim Football Club!During the JDT Stadium Tour, visitors will experience:- A guided tour of the state-of-the-art JDT Stadium, home of the Southern Tigers.- Access to the Players’ Lounge, Changing Room, Warm-up Room, and Media Zone.- A chance to step onto the world-class football pitch and capture unforgettable photos.- Interactive exhibits showcasing JDT’s trophies, milestones, and fan culture.- Perfect photo opportunities throughout the stadium, including the players’ tunnel and iconic viewpoints.Whether you’re a football enthusiast or a curious visitor, this tour promises an inspiring look into JDT’s passion, pride, and championship legacy.
Tour Duration: Approximately 45–60 minutes.
Tour Schedule: Please arrive 30 minutes before your selected time slot.
Tickets: Each ticket admits one person only; children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.
Restrictions: Certain areas may be temporarily closed due to maintenance or private events.
Bags & Personal Items: Backpacks and large handbags are not allowed inside the stadium. Storage space is available at the ticket counter for safe keeping.
Parking: Visitors may park at Parking Zone 5. The ticket counter is conveniently located right in front of the parking area.
Photography: Allowed in most areas; please follow the guide’s instructions.
Attire: Comfortable clothing and non-marking shoes are recommended.
Safety: Follow all safety guidelines and do not enter restricted zones.
Non-refundable: Tickets are non-refundable and non-transferable once purchased.
What’s included: Tour Duration: 60 Minutes
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: At Ticketing Counter
How to use: Ticket Redemption Counter: Stadium Sultan Ibrahim (In front of parking zone number 5)

TAGTHAi Pass

TAGTHAi is a collaboration platform between the Thai Government and the private sectors to make traveling in Thailand simple, convenient, and responsive to the needs of various types of the travelers including lifestyles, preferences, and languages based on locals’ recommendation and Thai Chamber of Commerce’s Happy Model philosophy: Eat well, Live well, Fit well, and Give well.How does the pass work1. Receive Your Voucher Code: In order to purchase your Pass through the website, you will receive a voucher code via email.2. Download the TAGTHAi App: Available on bothiOS https://apps.apple.com/th/app/tagthai/id1457643150Android https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.thaidigitalplatform.tagthaiThe app is where you’ll activate your pass by entering the order verification code.3. Redeem Voucher code before activating:-Sign in to TAGTHAi Application-Tab on the “Menu” (From the option bar at the bottom on the right side)-Select “Redeem My Voucher”-Enter your “Voucher Code” to redeemOnce you redeem the voucher code, you can follow these next steps!Please note:- Do not activate the pass until your travel date, as it is valid for 24 hours (1 day).- Some shops may require advance reservations. For more details, please check the app.1. Click the icon with (Up arrow key in it) to ‘ACTIVATE‘ your Pass.2. Explore and Choose: Browse the attractions, shops, and restaurants available in the app, and pick which ones you'd like to visit.3.. Booking in Advance: Some attractions might need a reservation to save your spot. Be sure to check the details on the website or app!Note: You’re allowed to make reservations even before activating your pass.4. Show Your QR Code: When you arrive at a location, inform them you're using the TAGTHAi City Pass and simply show your QR code for scanning.5. Enjoy your Pass!
Long Validity: Your pass is valid for 365 days from the day you purchase it.
Once you activated your Pass, your pass is valid for the next 24 hours.
Get your mobile tickets delivered right away for quick and easy access
Customize your journey by tailoring your itinerary with the attractions and dining options in your pass

Terms & Conditions: This tickets valid for all market. The Pass is valid for 24 hours (1-day pass) from the time of activation. For example, if the Pass is activated at 8:00 a.m., it will expire at 7:59 a.m. on the following day. Benefits can be redeemed at participating shops, restaurants, or attractions included in the Pass, subject to the quota of each Pass. Each user may redeem one benefit per location only during the validity period. Any redemption exceeding the included limit may be charged separately at the applicable rate. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before your scheduled time to ensure a smooth experience. Late arrival may affect your benefit redemption. The Pass is valid for dine-in services only and cannot be used for take-out orders. An unactivated Pass must be activated within 365 days from the date of purchase, otherwise it will automatically expire. The Pass is non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for cash under any circumstances. TAGTHAi reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions without prior notice.How does the pass work 1. Receive Your Voucher Code: In order to purchase your Pass through the website, you will receive a voucher code via email. 2. Download the TAGTHAi App: Available on both iOS https://apps.apple.com/th/app/tagthai/id1457643150 Android https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.thaidigitalplatform.tagthai The app is where you’ll activate your pass by entering the order verification code. 3. Redeem Voucher code before activating: -Sign in to TAGTHAi Application -Tab on the “Menu” (From the option bar at the bottom on the right side) -Select “Redeem My Voucher” -Enter your “Voucher Code” to redeem Once you redeem the voucher code, you can follow these next steps! Please note: - Do not activate the pass until your travel date, as it is valid for 24 hours (1 day). - Some shops may require advance reservations. For more details, please check the app. 1. Click the icon with (Up arrow key in it) to ‘ACTIVATE‘ your Pass. 2. Explore and Choose: Browse the attractions, shops, and restaurants available in the app, and pick which ones you'd like to visit. 3.. Booking in Advance: Some attractions might need a reservation to save your spot. Be sure to check the details on the website or app! Note: You’re allowed to make reservations even before activating your pass. 4. Show Your QR Code: When you arrive at a location, inform them you're using the TAGTHAi City Pass and simply show your QR code for scanning. 5. Enjoy your Pass!
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: Digital ticket for more than 12+ attractions, activities and restaurants, you can redeem up to 6 benefits in this pass.

Dino Desert Entry Ticket

Step into a prehistoric world at Dino Desert, an exciting attraction that combines the thrill of exploration with the wonder of dinosaurs. Set against a dramatic desert landscape, this immersive experience lets you wander through life-sized dinosaur replicas, interactive exhibits, and themed activities that transport you back to the age of these ancient giants.Discover fascinating facts about the creatures that once roamed the earth, take part in fossil-digging adventures, or embark on thrilling jeep rides through the rugged terrain. Perfect for families, friends, and dinosaur enthusiasts, Dino Desert offers an unforgettable blend of fun, education, and excitement.
Thrilling prehistoric theme transports visitors back to the age of dinosaurs
Experience majestic cliffs and panoramic views in a Jurassic setting
Embark on an unforgettable adventure at Dino Desert's prehistoric paradise
Dino Desert offers an exciting blend of history and adventure
Journey through time to when dinosaurs roamed the earth

Embark on an unforgettable adventure at Dino Desert, where majestic cliffs, and panoramic views collide with a thrilling prehistoric theme Jurassic age. Journey back in time when dinosaurs roam in Dino Desert now.
Bring a camera or smartphone to capture the incredible dinosaur replicas and scenic desert backdrops
Parts of the attraction may be outdoors; bring sunscreen, a hat, and water to stay hydrated in sunny weather.
Wear comfortable clothing and footwear suitable for walking or exploring rugged terrains. Hats and sunglasses are recommended for outdoor areas
Follow all safety guidelines, especially in interactive zones or during vehicle rides. Children should be supervised at all times.

Explore unique photo spots like Buckingham Palace and Gangster Town.

Mangrove or Fireflies Tour in Bintan

Mangrove:Dive deep into the heart of Bintan's wilderness with our exhilarating Mangrove Tour. This 1-hour eco-adventure on the Sebung River takes you through dense mangrove canopies, revealing a world of incredible biodiversity. Witness exotic wildlife, including agile monkeys, serene mangrove snakes, and intriguing monitor lizards. Keep your eyes peeled for mud lobsters and a plethora of other fascinating species.Fireflies Tour:Discover the serene beauty of Bintan's mangrove forest with our Fireflies Tour. As night falls, glide along the Sebong River and experience a moment of pure tranquility. Be captivated by the mesmerizing dance of fireflies, illuminating the riverbanks with their gentle glow. Complete your magical evening by gazing at the brilliant stars, made even more spectacular by the darkness surrounding you.

Carnival Magic Phuket

Carnival Magic is the crowning jewel in nighttime entertainment on the resort island of Phuket. Spanning over 40 acres and awash with dazzling colors and sparkling imagery, Carnival Magic comes to light as the very first Thai Cultural Carnival Park, celebrating the vibrancy and rich cultural heritage found in the many traditional festivals, carnivals and market fairs that abound throughout the Kingdom. Inspired by exotic carnival celebrations from around the world, Carnival Magic presents a breathtaking evening of joyous celebration, regal pageantry and cultural fun unmatched by any other show on earth.
Carnival Magic Phuket creates a vibrant and festive atmosphere reminiscent of traditional carnivals.
The carnival features a wide array of thrilling rides and attractions suitable for guests of all ages.
Visitors can enjoy live performances by talented entertainers, including circus acts, acrobats, magicians, and street performers.
Carnival Magic Phuket offers a variety of carnival games where guests can test their skills and win prizes.

A dazzling nighttime experience with colorful parades, Thai cultural performances, illuminated displays, and festive carnival vibes. Enjoy grand pageantry, photo spots, shopping, and a magical evening atmosphere.

Ocean Dream Samudra at Ancol

Ocean Dream Samudra is the largest oceanarium unit consisting of dolphin performances, sea lion performances, various animal performances, animal demonstrations, marine and freshwater fish aquariums and gardens which are the habitat of various kinds of birds.
Get to know and learn more about a variety of water animals at Ocean Dream Samudra.
One of the biggest oceanarium in Indonesia.
Meet cute little penguin and more water animals, only at Ocean Dream Samudra.
There are a variety of rides and attractions at Ocean Dream Samudra Ancol. Below are some of the highlights.

Mola Mola: The rides are definitely really fun and make you happy at Ocean Dream Samudra, our adrenaline is pumped up, we are invited to get dizzy together until we spin 360 degrees while feeling the rides go up and down. Enjoy it while laughing with your family because you can sit facing each other. At first, you might be nervous, but I guarantee that one time won't be enough, you'll definitely want to ride the rides many times. Another excitement is that we can recharge again after a day of watching the show at Ocean Dream Samudra.

Penguin Palace: Humboldt penguins from South America usually nest on rocky beaches. You can witness the behaviour of 11 cute and adorable Humboldt penguins at the Penguin Palace exhibit. You can also interact to feed them. Humboldt penguins like to eat anchovies, small sardines and squid.

Carousel: This is Ocean Dream Samudra's new ride. This carousel is presented with cute animal shapes such as sea horses, shells, dolphins, and ostrich. It's really exciting to be able to enjoy the rides and capture warm moments with the family.

Cruise Tasik Putrajaya

See Kuala Lumpur's calm side with a Putrajaya sightseeing cruise. Get on a boat and have a relaxing cruise at Putrajaya Lake to see the wonders of the city from a different perspective. See the Putra Mosque, the principal mosque of Putrajaya, which houses the Malaysian Prime Minister's office. Continue the tour with a visit to Putrajaya Government Centre and don't miss out on exploring the iconic Perdana Putra in detail. Incorporating a mix of architectural elements from Turkestan, Kazakhstan, and Morocco, it's a true sight to admire. Finally, get to see the grand Putra Bridge and all its wonders up close before heading back to your hotel.
Discover unique local architecture at Putrajaya Government Centre and Putra Mosque, which houses the Malaysian Prime Minister's office
Enjoy a relaxing half day trip on a Putrajaya cruise and discover Kuala Lumpur's calmer side in Putrajaya, 25km south of the capital
Hop on a sightseeing cruise, take a full glance of Putrajaya Lake
Learn more about this activity’s Enhanced Health & Hygiene Measures

Relaxing Cruise on Putrajaya Lake:Serene Boat Ride: Begin your journey with a tranquil cruise on the picturesque Putrajaya Lake. Enjoy the calm waters and the beautiful surroundings as you take in the sights from a unique perspective.Viewing Putra Mosque:Iconic Landmark: Sail past the stunning Putra Mosque, the principal mosque of Putrajaya. Admire its pink-domed architecture and its significant role as a major religious site in the city.Malaysian Prime Minister’s Office: The mosque is situated next to Perdana Putra, the Malaysian Prime Minister’s office, offering a remarkable view of these two important buildings.Visit to Putrajaya Government Centre:Architectural Marvel: Continue your tour with a visit to the Putrajaya Government Centre. Explore its impressive buildings and learn about the functions of this administrative hub.Perdana Putra: Delve into the details of Perdana Putra, a notable structure that incorporates a mix of architectural styles from Turkestan, Kazakhstan, and Morocco. Its unique design and grandeur make it a must-see attraction.Exploring Putra Bridge:Structural Wonder: Witness the grandeur of Putra Bridge, an architectural masterpiece that spans Putrajaya Lake. Get up close to appreciate its intricate design and the stunning views it offers.Return to Your Hotel:End of Tour: After exploring the key sights of Putrajaya, relax on your journey back to the hotel, reflecting on the serene and enriching experience.
Bring sunscreen and a hat to protect yourself from the sun during the cruise and outdoor explorations.
Wear comfortable clothing and shoes suitable for walking, especially as you will be exploring several sites on foot.

Singapore Oceanarium

Located at Resorts World Sentosa, Singapore Oceanarium is a leading ocean institute with the purpose to inspire greater knowledge, love, and action for the ocean and aquatic life. We are dedicated to advance marine education, research, and supporting the conservation and preservation of threatened species. With a unique blend of live habitats, oceanic stories, state-of-the-art digital innovation, and interactive technology, Singapore Oceanarium connects knowledge from meaningful marine education and encounters to real-world applications. Our long-term partnerships with institutes, accreditation by the Association of Zoos & Aquariums (AZA), and membership of World Association of Zoos and Aquariums (WAZA) and Southeast Asian Zoo and Aquarium Association (SEAZA) is a testament to our commitment to inspire generations of ocean stewards for greater action. Singapore Oceanarium also encompasses a Research and Learning Centre – a dedicated space that offers advanced purpose-built spaces for research, conservation and community outreach. Certified by Singapore’s Building and Construction Authority as a Green Mark Platinum Zero Energy building, the centre is designed with environmental sustainability at its core and its energy needs are powered entirely by solar energy.
One of the world’s largest kreisel tanks, home to over 5,000 moon jellyfish, offering a mesmerizing, ethereal display
A recreated mangrove habitat featuring interactive, touch‑friendly displays showcasing native biodiversity
Features life‑sized animatronics and fossils of prehistoric marine creatures, tracing evolution from primeval seas to land
A deep‑sea display portraying how whale carcasses nurture entire ecosystems, using immersive visuals and real habitats
A breathtaking 36‑metre‑wide viewing panel where reef manta rays and zebra sharks glide before your eyes

Step into a world where ocean discovery meets purpose-driven conservation at Singapore Oceanarium, located at Resorts World Sentosa. Designed as a leading ocean institute, the Oceanarium offers an immersive journey that inspires deeper understanding, appreciation, and action for marine life and ecosystems.Explore thoughtfully curated live habitats brought to life through compelling oceanic stories, enhanced by state-of-the-art digital innovation and interactive technology. These experiences connect meaningful marine encounters with real-world conservation efforts, making learning both engaging and impactful.Visitors can also look forward to the Oceanarium’s strong commitment to marine education and research, supported by long-term partnerships with renowned institutes. Its accreditations and memberships with AZA, WAZA, and SEAZA reflect global standards in animal care, conservation, and sustainability.A key highlight is the Research and Learning Centre, a purpose-built facility dedicated to research, conservation, and community outreach. As a Green Mark Platinum Zero Energy building certified by Singapore’s BCA, the centre showcases environmental sustainability in action, with operations powered entirely by solar energy.Together, these experiences make Singapore Oceanarium a place not just to observe the ocean—but to be inspired to protect it.

Malaysia Heritage Studios in Melaka

Welcome to Malaysia Heritage Studios, the pioneering magical heritage park in Malaysia! Immerse yourself in 13 captivating themes that brilliantly showcase the vibrant colors of Malaysia's rich heritage. Our unique experience transcends traditional museum learning, offering an enchanting journey through arts, architecture, nature, culture, history, and untold legends.
Walk through the corridors of time and witness history come alive.
Discover the magic woven into every detail as you embark on an enchanting adventure through the heart of Malaysia's cultural legacy.
Join us in celebrating Malaysia's heritage in a way that captures the imagination and touches the heart.
Step into a realm where arts, architecture, nature, culture, history, and untold legends converge in a mesmerizing and immersive experience.

Cultural Showcase: Explore various exhibits that showcase Malaysia’s diverse cultural heritage, including traditional costumes, musical instruments, and artifacts from different ethnic groups.Historical Artifacts: View an extensive collection of historical artifacts that provide insights into Malaysia’s rich history, from ancient times to the colonial era and beyond.Cultural Performances: Enjoy captivating performances of traditional dances, music, and theater. These performances bring to life the vibrant cultural traditions of Malaysia.Ethnic Studios: Explore themed studios dedicated to different ethnic groups in Malaysia, including Malay, Chinese, Indian, and Indigenous communities. Each studio offers a deep dive into the unique customs, traditions, and lifestyles of these communities.Craft Workshops: Participate in hands-on workshops where you can create your own traditional crafts, such as batik prints, beaded jewelry, or woven baskets.Guided Tours: Join guided heritage walks around the studio complex and its surroundings. Knowledgeable guides provide in-depth commentary on the historical and cultural significance of various sites and exhibits.Children’s Corner: A dedicated area for children with interactive games, storytelling sessions, and craft activities designed to educate and entertain young visitors.Cultural Souvenirs: Visit the souvenir shop to purchase unique cultural items and handicrafts, allowing you to take home a piece of Malaysia’s heritage.
Photography may be restricted in certain areas. Pay attention to signs and instructions from staff regarding photography.
Check for accessibility options if you have mobility concerns. The studios aim to accommodate all visitors, but it’s best to confirm available facilities.
What’s included: Standard Admission

Commbitz eSIM is a digital SIM card that allows users to connect to cellular networks without needing a physical SIM card. It enables travelers and users to easily access mobile data services in various countries without the hassle of swapping out physical SIM cards. The eSIM can be activated over the air by scanning a QR code, making it convenient for users to switch between different data plans or carriers.
Supports Android, iOS eSIM compatible devices
Get connected right after you land in your desired country
Get an instant data connection with a 5G data-only eSIM
24/7 business support and customer support services

With Commbitz eSIM, expect a hassle-free mobile data experience wherever you go. Instantly connect to local networks without changing physical SIM cards—just scan a QR code to activate your plan. Whether you're traveling or switching carriers, enjoy seamless access to reliable mobile data across multiple countries, all from your device.

Terms & Conditions: Commbitz eSIM can only be installed once Single-Device Use: An eSIM cannot be installed or reinstalled on multiple devices. After it’s activated on one device, it cannot be transferred to another. Non-Reinstallable: If you delete or remove the eSIM profile, whether for troubleshooting, device upgrades, or any other reason, you will not be able to reinstall it on the same device or any other device. A new eSIM purchase is required to reconnect to the network. Before installing, double-check that you are setting up the eSIM on the device you intend to use for the duration of its validity period. They can conveniently register through our user-friendly website, access our Commbitz App, or even register with the help of other trusted partners or agents. For added personalization, customers also have the option to upload a profile photo and share their travel preferences. Rest assured, providing this information is entirely voluntary and helps us tailor our services to meet your unique needs. By doing so, customers ensure that they are fully informed about their rights and responsibilities, while also maintaining their privacy and data security. When customers choose to purchase our Service, they are confirming that they already possess an unlocked and eSIM-compatible device, as this is a necessary requirement to fully enjoy the benefits of our Service. After making a purchase, it is important for customers to download the eSIM onto their device. This step ensures that the data plans are properly configured according to your order specifications. The best part is that once downloaded, the eSIM remains on your device even after your credit has been used up or your plan has expired. Customers have the flexibility to remove the eSIM in their phone settings whenever they please. However, we highly recommend that customers refrain from removing the eSIM until their plan has been fully utilized or expired. This will ensure a seamless and uninterrupted experience throughout their plan duration. In order to enjoy our services, customers are required to follow a simple process. Penang 3D Trick Art Museum

While most museums don't allow their visitors to take pictures, it's a different story at the Penang 3D Trick Art Museum. Visitors are encouraged to interact and have fun with the art pieces, and take as many photos as they want. Not like other museums, this art museum is an interactive attraction that embraces the old and the new by mixing art that features traditional Malaysian settings and what is considered to be present-day hip culture. Enjoy a day of fun with your family and friends where you get to live the lampung lifestyle by posing in front of a traditional Malaysian house, or perhaps pretend to boat and fish along the river, or pose as if you're doing extreme sports! It's the best activity to unleash your creative and fun side.
Immersive 3D art illusions perfect for interactive photos.
Creative exhibits showcasing culture, fantasy, and optical tricks.

Phuket Crocodile Farm and Crocodile Show

The first and largest crocodile farm in Phuket is not just a show, it is a huge center dedicated to these amazing animals.First, you will be guided through the Crocodile Museum. This is the only museum dedicated to these reptiles. Then a delightful crocodile show will leave an impression for a long time. And of course, here you can visit the souvenir center of crocodile leather products. Crocodile leather products have been considered an attribute of rich and stylish people for centuries. All products are made from animals raised or caught under a special license in the Kingdom of Thailand.Everyone knows that crocodile leather is used in the manufacture of clothing, shoes and bags. But few people know that crocodile meat is quite pleasant to the taste and is a cross between pork and chicken.In addition to crocodile leather products, the store offers products made from the skin of other exotic animals: snakes, stingrays, elephants or monitor lizards.
The first and largest crocodile farm in Phuket is not just a show, it is a huge center dedicated to these amazing animals

i-City Theme Park

I-City is a dream-like high-tech business district illuminated by digital neon lights. The entire area is covered with advanced LED light and shadow technology. It is the first night sightseeing attraction in Malaysia built with LED lights. In the evening, the Digital Light Studio is shrouded in LED lights of different colors, as if entering a magical world of light and shadow, which is exquisite. In addition to the colorful neon lights, there are also theme parks such as a tropical rainforest-themed water park, a red carpet wax museum full of superstars, a 3D illusion art museum, space missions and other theme parks, as well as many fashionable shopping districts, which are very suitable for family travel.
Malaysia’s first LED-lit night attraction, glowing with digital neon brilliance.
Trendy shopping districts and theme parks make it perfect for family travel.
Attractions include a Red Carpet Wax Museum and 3D Illusion Art Museum.
Tropical rainforest water park offering fun and adventure for all ages.
Immersive Digital Light Studio — step into a magical world of color and light.

At I-City, visitors can expect a dazzling experience filled with vibrant LED lights and digital art that transform the entire area into a glowing wonderland at night. The Digital Light Studio offers a magical display of colors and light, while attractions like the tropical rainforest water park, Red Carpet Wax Museum, and 3D Illusion Art Museum add fun and excitement for all ages. With its mix of futuristic lighting, exciting theme parks, and trendy shopping spots, I-City is a perfect destination for families looking for a lively and unforgettable outing.
